name: Fujiyama Texas
tagline: The ultimate late-night salvation — kushi katsu (deep-fried skewers) until 3:30am, perfect for when the clubs close and you need real food.
parking: Small lot behind restaurant off S. King St; street parking on side streets in Moiliili
talkStory: A Moiliili institution since the 1980s, Fujiyama Texas fuses Japanese izakaya with Texas-sized portions. The name itself captures Hawaii's cultural mash-up spirit — Japanese craft meets American excess.
insiderTips: Open until 3:30am (except Tue). Midnight Diner menu kicks in at 11pm.
